name: 各亞型 SARA 年進展速率對照（跨世代整合）
group: 整合 EUROSCA、CRC-SCA、統合分析與台灣世代
findings: 統合平均（Diallo 2021）：SCA1 約 1.83、SCA2 約 1.40、SCA3 約 1.41、SCA6 約 0.81 分/年；SCA17 在台灣世代達 3.26（最快）。同一亞型跨世代可差 2–3 倍——例：SCA3 歐洲 EUROSCA 1.5–1.6 vs 美國 CRC-SCA 0.68。
significance: → 療效試驗的核心對照基準。關鍵警示：競品若宣稱「延緩 SARA X 分」，務必回查其對照世代的基線進展速率，否則療效幅度會被高估或低估。

sources.label: 統合分析 Diallo 2021 J Neurol

nameEn: Cross-cohort SARA annual progression by subtype

en.group: Integrates EUROSCA, CRC-SCA, meta-analyses and a Taiwan cohort
en.findings: Pooled means (Diallo 2021): SCA1 ~1.83, SCA2 ~1.40, SCA3 ~1.41, SCA6 ~0.81 points/yr; SCA17 reaches 3.26 (fastest) in a Taiwan cohort. The same subtype can differ 2–3× across cohorts — e.g. SCA3 European EUROSCA 1.5–1.6 vs US CRC-SCA 0.68.
en.significance: → The core comparator baseline for efficacy trials. Key caveat: if a competitor claims to 'slow SARA by X points', always check the baseline progression rate of its comparator cohort, or the effect size is over- or under-stated.

name: EUROSCA 前瞻自然史世代
group: Jacobi、Klockgether 等（EUROSCA；17 中心/10 歐洲國）
findings: 長期（最長約 8 年）SARA 年進展：SCA1 2.11、SCA3 1.56、SCA2 1.49、SCA6 0.80 分/年（mean±SE）；SCA1 最快、SCA6 最慢且呈非線性。
significance: → 全球最重要的 SCA 自然史世代，確立各亞型進展基準線，是評估「疾病修飾療法能否壓平 SARA 斜率」的黃金對照。

sources.label: 長期進展 Jacobi 2015 Lancet Neurol

en.group: Jacobi, Klockgether et al. (EUROSCA; 17 centres / 10 European countries)
en.findings: Long-term (up to ~8 yr) SARA annual progression: SCA1 2.11, SCA3 1.56, SCA2 1.49, SCA6 0.80 points/yr (mean±SE); SCA1 fastest, SCA6 slowest and non-linear.
en.significance: → The single most important SCA natural-history cohort, establishing per-subtype progression baselines; the gold-standard comparator for whether a disease-modifying therapy can flatten the SARA slope.

name: 四世代 SARA 進展整合分析
group: Petit 等；整合 EUROSCA + RISCA + CRC-SCA + SPATAX
findings: 同一亞型跨世代速率差異顯著、EUROSCA 一律最快。例：SCA3 EUROSCA 1.52 vs CRC-SCA 0.68；SCA1 EUROSCA 2.19 vs RISCA 1.32。
significance: → 關鍵情報：進展速率高度依賴收案世代，競品療效宣稱須以其對照世代為準來解讀。

en.group: Petit et al.; integrates EUROSCA + RISCA + CRC-SCA + SPATAX
en.findings: Same-subtype rates differ significantly across cohorts, EUROSCA consistently fastest. E.g. SCA3 EUROSCA 1.52 vs CRC-SCA 0.68; SCA1 EUROSCA 2.19 vs RISCA 1.32.
en.significance: → Key intelligence: progression rate depends heavily on the enrolled cohort; competitor efficacy claims must be read against their own comparator cohort.

name: SCA 自然史統合分析 (meta-analysis)
significance: → 跨研究合併平均，是估算試驗樣本數與效應量最穩健的單一數字來源。

en.significance: → A cross-study pooled mean; the most robust single-number source for estimating trial sample size and effect size.

name: RISCA 發病前 (preataxic) 世代
group: Klockgether、Durr 等（14 中心/7 歐洲國）
findings: 追蹤期轉為顯性失調比例：SCA1 52%、SCA2 59%、SCA3 42%、SCA6 13%；非攜帶者幾乎不轉化。血清 NfL 在發病前即升高。
significance: → 唯一大型「發病前轉化率」世代，為症狀前介入試驗（ASO / 基因療法）提供轉化率與樣本數依據。

en.group: Klockgether, Durr et al. (14 centres / 7 European countries)
en.findings: Conversion to manifest ataxia during follow-up: SCA1 52%, SCA2 59%, SCA3 42%, SCA6 13%; non-carriers essentially do not convert. Serum NfL rises already in the pre-ataxic stage.
en.significance: → The only large 'pre-ataxic conversion-rate' cohort, providing conversion rates and sample-size basis for pre-symptomatic intervention trials (ASO / gene therapy).

name: 美國世代：CRC-SCA / READISCA
scope: SCA1/2/3/6/7 等 + SCA1/3 試驗準備
group: Ashizawa 等（NAF 支持）；READISCA 為 NIH 資助美歐合作
n: CRC-SCA 累計 1,089；READISCA 臨床 200/影像 107
findings: 美國最大 SCA 生物樣本/臨床庫。READISCA：發病前 SCA1/3 攜帶者血漿 NfL 已顯著高於對照（對照 5.7、SCA1 18.0、SCA3 19.8 pg/mL）。
significance: → 北美對照與生物標記基準；直接對應 SCA1/SCA3 疾病修飾試驗的終點與生物標記選擇。

sources.label: CRC-SCA 生物標記庫 Lin 2025 Cerebellum

en.group: Ashizawa et al. (NAF-supported); READISCA is an NIH-funded US–Europe collaboration
en.findings: The largest US SCA biosample/clinical database. READISCA: pre-ataxic SCA1/3 carriers already have significantly elevated plasma NfL vs controls (control 5.7, SCA1 18.0, SCA3 19.8 pg/mL).
en.significance: → North-American comparator and biomarker baseline; directly relevant to endpoint and biomarker choice for SCA1/SCA3 disease-modifying trials.

name: 美國 NAF 自然史庫（CRC-SCA）— 外部對照用途
nameEn: US NAF natural-history dataset (CRC-SCA) — as external control
group: CRC-SCA（17 站學術聯盟，National Ataxia Foundation 支持；Ashizawa 等）
findings: 自 2009 年起追蹤常見 SCA 亞型自然病程、以 SARA 為主要 COA；2024 起納入 RFC1/FGF14（CANVAS、SCA27B）等晚發型。此類美國＋歐洲自然史世代已實際被拿來當單臂試驗的『外部對照』：Biohaven troriluzole 即以 35 站美歐自然史世代、用傾向分數配對（PSM，配對基線 f-SARA、年齡、性別、發病年齡、基因型、重複長度）建立未治療對照組。
significance: → 對仲恩關鍵：美國二期若不設安慰劑對照，可用 NAF 支持的自然史庫（SARA 縱貫資料）作外部/歷史對照，是單臂細胞治療試驗療效解讀的對照基礎。引用時須注意各世代進展速率差異（見跨世代條目）。

en.group: CRC-SCA (17-site academic consortium, supported by the National Ataxia Foundation; Ashizawa et al.)
en.findings: Since 2009 has tracked the natural course of common SCA subtypes with SARA as primary COA; from 2024 added late-onset RFC1/FGF14 (CANVAS, SCA27B). Such US+European natural-history cohorts have actually been used as an 'external control' for single-arm trials: Biohaven's troriluzole built an untreated comparator from 35-site US/European natural-history cohorts using propensity-score matching (matched on baseline f-SARA, age, sex, onset age, genotype, repeat length).
en.significance: → Key for Steminent: if the US Phase 2 runs without a placebo arm, the NAF-supported natural-history dataset (longitudinal SARA) can serve as an external/historical control — the comparator basis for interpreting a single-arm cell-therapy trial. When citing, mind cohort-to-cohort differences in progression rate (see the cross-cohort entry).

sources.label: CRC-SCA 自然史庫 Lin 2025 Cerebellum

name: 日本 SCA6 三年世代
findings: SARA 每年惡化 1.33±1.40 分/年（3 年間）；數值高於歐洲 EUROSCA 的 SCA6（0.80），提示族群/方法差異。
significance: → 亞洲 SCA6 進展速率的獨立佐證。

en.findings: SARA worsens 1.33±1.40 points/yr (over 3 yr); higher than European EUROSCA SCA6 (0.80), suggesting population/method differences.
en.significance: → Independent Asian evidence of SCA6 progression rate.

name: ESMI — SCA3/MJD 生物標記縱貫世代
group: Berger、Klockgether 等（歐洲 5 國 + 美國）
findings: 血漿 NfL 發病前約 21.5 年即開始異常升高；影像（腦橋體積）對進展比 SARA 更敏感；突變 ATXN3 蛋白全程幾乎恆定、不宜當進展指標。
significance: → 為 SCA3 ASO 療法（如 Biogen/Ionis 靶向 ATXN3）提供進展生物標記選擇依據。

en.group: Berger, Klockgether et al. (5 European countries + USA)
en.findings: Plasma NfL starts to rise abnormally ~21.5 yr before onset; imaging (pons volume) is more sensitive to progression than SARA; mutant ATXN3 protein is near-constant throughout and unsuitable as a progression marker.
en.significance: → Provides progression-biomarker selection guidance for SCA3 ASO therapies (e.g. Biogen/Ionis targeting ATXN3).

name: SCA3 血清 NfL 生物標記（華人世代）
findings: 顯性患者血清 NfL 37.6 vs 對照 9.1 pg/mL；與 SARA 正相關（r=0.55）、與小腦/腦幹體積負相關。
significance: → 確立血清 NfL 為 SCA3 發病與進展生物標記，並在華人族群驗證。

en.findings: Manifest patients' serum NfL 37.6 vs control 9.1 pg/mL; positively correlated with SARA (r=0.55) and negatively with cerebellar/brainstem volume.
en.significance: → Establishes serum NfL as an onset and progression biomarker for SCA3, validated in a Chinese population.

name: 台灣 SCA 基因地景（876 例）
group: Lan、Lee 等（台北榮總，全國轉診中心，橫跨 25 年）
findings: 台灣亞型分佈：SCA3 最多 56.6%、SCA2 20.0%、SCA6 10.3%，其餘 SCA1/SCA8/DRPLA。重複擴增數與發病年齡顯著負相關（DRPLA 最強）。
significance: → 台灣最完整的 SCA 亞型分佈基準；SCA3 佔逾半數，是台灣 SCA 新藥市場與試驗招募的核心族群依據。
taiwan: 台灣本土最大、最新的亞型分佈資料；SCA3 主導與國際一致但比例更高。
nameEn: Genetic landscape of SCA in Taiwan (876 cases)

en.group: Lan, Lee et al. (Taipei VGH, national referral centre, spanning 25 years)
en.findings: Taiwan subtype distribution: SCA3 most common 56.6%, SCA2 20.0%, SCA6 10.3%, plus SCA1/SCA8/DRPLA. Repeat length inversely correlated with onset age (strongest in DRPLA).
en.significance: → Taiwan's most complete SCA subtype-distribution baseline; SCA3 exceeds half, the core population for Taiwan's SCA drug market and trial recruitment.
en.taiwan: Taiwan's largest, most recent subtype-distribution data; SCA3 dominance matches international trends but at a higher proportion.

name: 台灣 SCA 進展速率（華人 vs 高加索）
group: Lin、Soong Bing-Wen 等（台北榮總/陽明）
findings: SARA 年進展：SCA17 3.26（最快）、SCA3 1.60、SCA2 1.52、SCA1 1.23、SCA6 0.99 分/年；華人與高加索速率相近。
significance: → 唯一台灣本土 SARA 年進展數據，證明台灣患者可直接對比歐美世代、支持參與國際多中心試驗。
taiwan: 唯一台灣本土進展速率。註：此世代 SCA3（1.60）明顯快於美國 CRC-SCA（0.68），凸顯世代/收案差異。
nameEn: SCA progression rate in Taiwan (Chinese vs Caucasian)

en.group: Lin, Soong Bing-Wen et al. (Taipei VGH / Yang-Ming)
en.findings: SARA annual progression: SCA17 3.26 (fastest), SCA3 1.60, SCA2 1.52, SCA1 1.23, SCA6 0.99 points/yr; Chinese and Caucasian rates are similar.
en.significance: → The only native-Taiwan SARA progression data, showing Taiwanese patients can be compared directly with European/US cohorts, supporting participation in international multicenter trials.
en.taiwan: The only native-Taiwan progression rates. Note: this cohort's SCA3 (1.60) is markedly faster than US CRC-SCA (0.68), highlighting cohort/enrollment differences.

name: 台灣 SCA 非失調表現型
findings: 帕金森症候群為最常見的非失調表現（21.1%），比例高於高加索及其他亞洲 SCA 族群。
significance: → 台灣 SCA 臨床異質性高，療效評估不應只看 SARA，需納入非失調症狀。
taiwan: 台灣族群非失調症狀特徵。
nameEn: Non-ataxic phenotypes of SCA in Taiwan

en.findings: Parkinsonism is the most common non-ataxic feature (21.1%), higher than in Caucasian and other Asian SCA populations.
en.significance: → High clinical heterogeneity in Taiwan SCA; efficacy assessment should not rely on SARA alone but also capture non-ataxic symptoms.
en.taiwan: Non-ataxic symptom profile of the Taiwan population.
